content.en:
Human domain.

Ye Tian came back, and he breathed a sigh of relief.

"So many first-order supreme rule items, enough for me!"

Ye Tian took out the Abyss Skull Stone, and then began to comprehend the first sequence of Dao rules with the help of the Mi Luo statue.

The Abyss Skull Stone is a low-quality first-order supreme rule, and the side effects are very large, according to the identification of the Innate Primordial Treasure of the Eye of Identification, refining the Abyss Skull Stone will be corroded by a terrifying force to corrode the flesh and the Mythical Origin, and the cost is very high.

But.

Ye Tian didn't care at all.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian continued to refine one Abyss Skeleton Stone after another, using these Abyss Skeleton Stones to comprehend the first sequence of Supreme Dao rules.

Gradually, Ye Tian's first sequence to the realm of Dao rules became higher and higher.

And at the same time that Ye Tian's first sequence of Dao Rule realm was raised, his supreme mythical body had also begun to complete its second transformation.

this day.

The dragon scale mythical body began its second metamorphosis, which was due to the fact that he used the legendary blood treasure to absorb a large amount of resources for improvement, and also used various resources that helped to improve the mythical body, so that the progress would be so fast.

Rumble!!!!

The dragon scale mythical body has completed the second transformation, making Ye Tian's body stronger and his strength has also increased a little.

In the years that followed, one by one the mythical bodies completed the second transformation, and their strength became stronger and stronger.

When Ye Tian's eighteen supreme mythical bodies had all completed their second transformation, it had been a long time coming.

And at this time, his first sequence of supreme dao rules had finally been raised to the realm of ten percent perfection, and to be able to raise the first sequence of supreme dao rules to this level so quickly, the role of the Mi Luo statue was very great.

this day.

The First Elder sent a notification letter, and after the five million Solstice Age, the Patriarch will be re-ranked.

There are only thirty-six elders in the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and this position has always been so much, if you want to enter this ranking, you have to challenge the top thirty-six elders.

Of course.

If you are in the top 36 and want to rank higher, you can also take the challenge.

But under normal circumstances, the positions of the top ten have not changed for endless years, and the main thing is that their strength has almost reached the limit, and it is very difficult to improve again, unless you get an amazing innate original treasure, you can make your strength skyrocket.

Many of the patriarchs received this summons, but they didn't pay much attention to it, it had nothing to do with them anyway, and they knew that they couldn't be among the top thirty-six patriarchs.

So, this matter has nothing to do with them, what should they do.

But.

Ye Tian attached great importance to it.

"Maybe I have a chance to finish in the top thirty-six!"

Ye Tian thought.

Of course.

He is definitely not qualified now, after all, the power is not strong, even if he comprehends the first sequence of supreme path rules of the consummation realm, but his cultivation has not yet been improved, and the Mythical Supreme Body has only completed two transformations, although there are many Supreme Legendary Bodies superimposed, but at most it is equivalent to the Supreme Mythical Body of five or six transformations.

Among the top thirty-six patriarchs, there are also patriarchs who have taken the path of the strongest to the Dao, and they have all completed seven or eight transformations of the Mythical Body, and almost all of them have reached the late stage of the Mythical Dao Realm or even the peak realm.

In comparison, he doesn't have much advantage right now.

"There are still five million Dao Era time, and there is still plenty of time, if I use the Divine Qiongzhu to absorb all kinds of precious resources, and I don't care about the price, there is a high probability that I will be able to raise my cultivation to the middle realm of the Mythical Dao Realm. "

"The first sequence of supreme path rules has been completed, and there is no way to improve in this aspect, then it can only improve the body of the Supreme Myth, and there should be hope that the body of the Supreme Myth will complete the third transformation, but it will also cost infinite precious resources. "

The years that followed.

Ye Tian didn't care about the consumption of resources at all, all kinds of top-level resources were constantly refined, just to improve his strength.

There are also a few veterans, whose strength is close to the first grade, are also desperately improving their strength, and they all want to enter the ranks of the top 36 veterans, which is not only prestige and reputation, but also a benefit!

There are some resources that only the top 36 patriarchs have the opportunity to enjoy, which is why they all want to become the top 36 patriarchs.

Moreover, in many secret meetings, these thirty-six patriarchs will not inform the ordinary patriarchs.

Therefore, if you have the strength, you have to fight for this place.

......

Time flies.

Ye Tian didn't have any free time at all, and all the copies of his body were cultivating in penance, and he also created all kinds of top-notch first-order supreme Dao supernatural powers, and it was good to increase his strength a little more!

Gradually.

Ye Tian's strength slowly increased.

One million solstice!

Two million to the Dao Era!

Three million to the Dao Era!

Finally, the time for the five million solstice era is approaching.

this day.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's cultivation finally broke through to the middle realm of the Mythical Dao Realm with the help of the innate primordial treasure of the Divine Qiongzhu.

Soon after, his dragon scale myth body also completed its third metamorphosis.

Since all of his Mythical Bodies were cultivating at the same time, the other Supreme Mythical Bodies had also completed their third transformations one after another.

Before the Patriarch Sort War, all of his mythical bodies had completed their third metamorphosis.

"Almost, this time I will definitely be able to win a place for the top thirty-six veterans!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

Innate Origin Alliance Headquarters.

A replica of Ye Tian's body came here, and he also brought the Eye of Identification and the statue of Miro.

Due to the Miro statue, the Miro Domain has disappeared temporarily, and as long as it is put back, the Milo Domain can be reopened.

And Ye Tian's wife, son, and daughter also came with him, and they would not delay their cultivation because they didn't have the Miluo Domain.

Ye Tian's family of four came to the headquarters of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, which still aroused the envy of many elders.

"Elder Ye Tian!"

"Elder Ye Xingchen!"

"Elder Xiao Yue!"

"Elder Ye Xingyue!"

Many veterans also greeted them one by one.

And Ye Tian and they also responded, chatting a few words.

Su Yuan and Su Ho like the Su clan also came, and now Su Yuan has finally recovered from his injuries.

However, these veterans just came to see the excitement, not to participate, after all, the strength is not good, and it is a shame to sign up!

Time passed slowly, and many elders came, but there were still elders who did not come.

Soon.

The First Patriarch is here.

"Ladies and gentlemen, if you want to challenge the top thirty-six elders, you can sign up now. "

After the first patriarch finished speaking, several patriarchs went to sign up.

And Ye Tian also went over to sign up.
